channel.title: Comments for page "Fixing logins on Chrome and Edge"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Fixing logins on Chrome and Edge"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: An old redirect on the /forum page seems like the culprit. I've adjusted it to use the *.wikidot.com version of the site (since Wikidot can't do relative links with parameters apparently).

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Ey http://www.wikidot.com/user:info/aismallard, gotta say this still got some issues for us begginer users because of the thing we need to go to the forums, to which when we search for the forum category and click on it, the URL shifts from scp-wiki.wikidot.com to www.scpwiki.com.

As you can see the URL shifts by this point your account is gone again, meaning bad news for us I can fix it on my computer though, just calling it out for the other users, they may get frustrated for days with this issue.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Alternatively, one can go to edge://flags/ or chrome://flags/ and change the SameSite by default cookies parameter to Disabled, which will allow users to log in with scpwiki.com domain.

May not be supported in future versions or might break something, so it's at your own discretion.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I spent so long having trouble trying to log in, then I found this. Thank you for the help.

Shouldn't this be pinned to the main page though? It's kind of weird that such a necessary help page is buried in the middle of the guides page.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Effing brilliant, thank you so much for this, aismallard. :D

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: As a general note, for a prompt reply, try messaging a staff member directly rather than just putting a forum comment and assuming that someone will regularly check the page. For this case, ask a Technical Team staff member (use the Contact Staff page).

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Hey, I'm still having issues getting it to work with chrome on my desk top. Idk it has something to do with the links I'm putting in. If you could copy paste the ones you used it would be wonderful, and thanks a million.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I was tired and momentarily thought I was reading a new Pedantique SCP.

Jokes aside, great article.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Hey, thanks a ton! It was a real pain to not be able to rate/comment on desktop for a while.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Images are screenshots I have taken on devices I own and were edited by myself. The exception is redirector-extension.png, which was taken by TheMightyMcB. They are available under the site license, CC-BY-SA 3.0.
